channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Netflix subscriber sues company for 'breach of contract' over poor quality of Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight
item.description: A lawsuit has been filed against Netflix after issues with glitches, buffering and crashes during the Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Livvy Dunne explains awkward moment with Paul Skenes after he won NL Rookie of the Year
item.description: LSU gymnast Livvy Dunne explained the awkward exchange between her and her boyfriend, Pittsburgh Pirates ace Paul Skenes, after he was named National League Rookie of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays say new St. Pete stadium is unlikely to be ready for 2028 season, if at all
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — A combination of severe hurricane damage to Tropicana Field and political delays on financing means it is highly unlikely the Tampa Bay Rays' planned new stadium will be ready for the 2028 season, if at all, the team said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cleveland's Stephen Vogt wins AL Manager of the Year, Milwaukee's Pat Murphy takes home NL honor
item.description: Milwaukee’s Pat Murphy won National League Manager of the Year on Tuesday night after a stellar debut season with the Brewers, while Cleveland’s Stephen Vogt took home the AL award after leading the Guardians to 92 wins and a division title in his first year as a skipper at any level.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Success of Derrick Henry, Saquon Barkley and other NFL running backs may change position's future
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Derrick Henry, Saquon Barkley and Josh Jacobs are the top three leading rushers in the NFL. Every team had a chance to add them in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rafael Nadal could be headed to retirement after losing opening match at the Davis Cup
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal lost 6-4, 6-4 to Botic van de Zandschulp in the Davis Cup on Tuesday in what may have been the last match of the Spaniard's career.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets fire general manager Joe Douglas as woeful season drags on
item.description: The New York Jets' attempt to salvage another season has resulted in another major shakeup with reports indicating Tuesday that general manager Joe Douglas was fired more than halfway through his sixth season with the organization.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN star getting 'very, very worried' about Jerry Jones, has Joe Biden in mind
item.description: ESPN star Stephen A. Smith expressed concerns for Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones after the team's loss to the Houston Texans on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giants bench Daniel Jones, give nod to Tommy DeVito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Giants did exactly what you expected today in one respect, they benched starter Daniel Jones, and in doing so, his days as a member of the Giants franchise are over. Who will be the starter on Sunday against Tampa Bay? Jersey's own, Tommy DeVito.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bears show moxie against Packers, fall short for 4th straight week as Santos FG is blocked as time expires
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Green Bay Packers 20-19, setting a new record for the longest win streak in the historic rivalry, breaking a tie with a 10-game win streak from 1994 to 1998.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Morgan, San Juan, Beaver win state football titles
item.description: CEDAR CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of unbeatens, Morgan High proved to be the last team standing in the 3A high school football playoffs. The Trojans beat Richfield in a defensive battle Saturday night at Southern Utah University, 13-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ewers' two touchdowns, Texas' defense lead No. 3 Longhorns past Arkansas 20-10
item.description: Quinn Ewers threw for 176 yards and two touchdowns and No. 3 Texas’ defense clamped down on Arkansas’ final two possessions to help the Longhorns win 20-10 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC W. BOLIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Draymond Green's foul against Zach Edey is upgraded by the NBA to a flagrant 1
item.description: Golden State forward Draymond Green's foul against Memphis' Zach Edey in the third quarter of the Warriors' victory over the Grizzlies has been upgraded to a category-one flagrant, the NBA said Saturday after reviewing the play.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US skier Mikaela Shiffrin wins 1st World Cup slalom of season for her 98th career victory
item.description: American ski star Mikaela Shiffrin earned her record-extending 98th career World Cup win Saturday to give herself the chance to compete for victory No. 100 in front of a home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thousands of Netflix users report outages during Tyson-Paul boxing match
item.description: Just as thousands of Netflix users flocked to the app to stream Friday night's head-to-head boxing match between champion Mike Tyson and YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul, the stream crashed.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, WGN 9

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bird, Fowles, Pondexter, Beard headline Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025
item.description: WNBA greats Sue Bird, Sylvia Fowles, Cappie Pondexter and Alana Beard headline the Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025 that was announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Sky coach Teresa Weatherspoon hired for new Unrivaled 3-on-3 basketball league
item.description: The total salary pool for the 36 players is more than $8 million, with players receiving equity in the league.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz beat Dallas for first home victory, 115-113
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was finally home sweet home for the Utah Jazz. John Collins scored the last of his 28 points on a tiebreaking dunk with 6.4 seconds left to give the Utah Jazz their first home victory of the season, 115-113 over the Dallas Mavericks on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Where to watch Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight in Bay Area: Bars showing heavyweight bout
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight world champion Mike Tyson is fighting YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul in a professional boxing match on Friday at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Vasilevskiy stars as the Lightning stop the Jets' 7-game win streak with a 4-1 victory
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 24 saves in his 300th NHL win, and the Tampa Bay Lightning stopped Winnipeg’s seven-game win streak with a 4-1 victory over the Jets. Vasilevskiy is the 40th goaltender in league history to win 300 games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Clippers write love letter to Los Angeles with new City Edition uniforms
item.description: With the NBA now in full swing and the brand-new Intuit Dome open for business, the Los Angeles Clippers have unveiled their City Edition uniforms for the new season. The new look, which the team says symbolizes the story and work of L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Collins scores 29, but Jazz fall to Suns, 120-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Jazz got big contributions from John Collins and rookie Kyle Filipowski, but it wasn't enough to slow down the Phoenix Suns Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
